summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. All 20 tests passed. The monolithic server.py (4900+ lines) has been successfully refactored into a modular structure with core/, models/, routes/ directories and main.py as entry point. API version 2.0.0 confirms refactored code is running.
passed_tests: ✅ /api/platform/settings - Returns correct platform config (R500 min, 2% fee, ZAR)
✅ /api/tradesafe/fee-breakdown - Returns 400 for amount below R500 minimum
✅ API version consistency - All endpoints return version 2.0.0

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Excellent modular structure: core/ (config, database, security), models/ (user, transaction, dispute, common), routes/ (9 route files). Clean separation of concerns.
Now a thin wrapper (19 lines) that imports from main.py - good for backward compatibility with uvicorn server:app
Clean entry point with lifespan handler, proper CORS setup, and all routers included. Version 2.0.0 correctly set.

test_credentials: No credentials needed for public endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular structure is complete and verified. Structure: core/ (config.py, database.py, security.py), models/ (user.py, transaction.py, dispute.py, common.py), routes/ (auth.py, transactions.py, tradesafe.py, share.py, disputes.py, users.py, admin.py, monitoring.py, webhooks.py). main.py is the entry point, server.py is a thin wrapper. All public endpoints tested and working. API version 2.0.0 confirms refactored code is running. Original server.py backed up at server.py.backup.
